heading: Participation of non-Federal entities in contract negotiations and source selection proceedings
label: 1475a Participation of non-Federal entities in contract negotiations and source selection proceedings
text: On and after , the Bureau of Reclamation may invite non-Federal entities involved in cost sharing arrangements for the development of water projects to participate in contract negotiation and source selection proceedings without invoking provisions of chapter 10 of title 5: , That such non-Federal participants shall be subject to the provisions of chapter 21 of title 41 and to the conflict of interest provisions appearing at et seq. (1988).October 2, 1992Provided18 U.S.C. 201
notes: CodificationIn text, “chapter 21 of title 41” substituted for “the Federal Procurement Integrity Act ( (1988))” on authority of , , , which Act enacted Title 41, Public Contracts.41 U.S.C. 423Pub. L. 111–350, § 6(c)124 Stat. 3854Jan. 4, 2011
Amendments2022— substituted “chapter 10 of title 5:” for “the Federal Advisory Committee Act (5 U.S.C. Appendix (1988)):”.Pub. L. 117–286
